headline: LISA Announces Las Vegas Residency VIVA LA LISA at The Colosseum at Caesars Palace Nov 13, 14, 27 & 28, 2026
summary: LAS VEGAS, March 30, 2026--Today, world-renowned rapper, singer, dancer, and style icon LISA announces her first-ever Las Vegas residency, VIVA LA LISA, coming to The Colosseum at Caesars Palace in November 2026 for a limited run of select dates. With this announcement, LISA makes history as the first K-pop artist to perform a Las Vegas residency, taking the stage for two weekends on November 13 and 14 and November 27 and 28.

headline: A Look At Caesars Entertainment (CZR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent Price Performance and Business Snapshot Caesars Entertainment (CZR) has had mixed share price moves recently, with a 3.9% decline over the past day and a small loss over the past week, while posting gains over the month and past three months. The company runs a broad gaming and hospitality operation that includes casinos, hotels, entertainment venues and digital wagering. Annual revenue is reported at US$11.49b, with a net loss of US$502m, and annual revenue and net income growth rates...
